name: Dirty Rice (g)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken fat, gizzards, pork, and bay leaves in a large heavy skillet over high heat. Cook until the meat is thoroughly browned, about 6 minutes, stirring occasionally.
2. Stir in the onion, celery, bell pepper, garlic, Tabasco sauce, salt, black pepper, paprika, mustard, cumin, thyme, and oregano. Mix well, scraping the pan bottom to incorporate any brown bits.
3. Add the butter and stir until melted.
4. Reduce heat to medium. Cook for about 8 minutes, stirring constantly and scraping the pan bottom well.
5. Add the pork stock and continue cooking until any mixture clinging to the pan bottom dissolves. Cook for another 8 minutes over high heat, stirring once.
6. Stir in the chicken livers and cook for about 2 minutes.
7. Add the rice and stir thoroughly. Cover the pan and turn the heat to very low. Cook for about 5 minutes.
8. Remove from heat and let stand covered until the rice is tender, about 10 minutes. Discard the bay leaves before serving.
